title: Add missing high-priority tests for custom_commands, risk_evaluator, file tool, shell tool
goal: testing-strategy.md에서 우선순위 '높음'으로 표시된 누락 테스트를 추가한다: custom_commands.py의 match_custom_command, tools/file/tool.py의 read/write/copy/delete, tools/shell/tool.py의 허용/차단 명령 실행.

test_requirements.case: custom_commands: contains match type matches substring
custom_commands: exact match type only matches full string
test_requirements.expected: returns match for exact, None for partial

test_requirements.case: custom_commands: disabled command is not matched
test_requirements.expected: returns None even if trigger matches

test_requirements.case: file tool: read existing file returns content
file tool: read nonexistent file returns error
file tool: write creates file in allowed dir
test_requirements.expected: success=True, file exists with correct content

test_requirements.case: file tool: write to blocked path returns error
shell tool: blocked command returns error

constraints: Do not modify any source code — test-only changes
File tool tests must use /tmp for read/write/delete (cleanup after each test)
Shell tool tests must not execute dangerous commands (test policy check, not actual execution where risky)
Custom commands tests must stub config_store
test_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v
test_focus_command: cd backend && python3 -m unittest tests.test_custom_commands tests.test_file_tool tests.test_shell_tool -v
